name: FusionAuth
description: FusionAuth is a self-hostable identity and access management platform. It provides APIs for user registration, login, JWT management, multi-factor authentication, application management, tenant configuration, group management, passwordless login, and consent tracking.

auth.note: Pass your API key directly in the Authorization header without a prefix.

capabilities.name: users_create
capabilities.description: Create a new user in FusionAuth. Optionally register them to an application in the same request.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user by ID, email, or username. Returns full user data with registrations.

capabilities.name: users_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing user's profile data.

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user by ID. Optionally soft-delete (deactivate) instead of hard delete.

capabilities.name: users_search
capabilities.description: Search for users with complex query criteria, pagination and sorting.

capabilities.name: users_change_password
capabilities.description: Change a user's password by providing the current and new password.

capabilities.name: login
capabilities.description: Authenticate a user with email/username and password. Returns JWT access and refresh tokens.

capabilities.name: login_two_factor
capabilities.description: Complete a two-factor authentication login by providing the MFA code.

capabilities.name: registrations_create
capabilities.description: Register an existing user to an application with roles.

capabilities.name: registrations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's registration for a specific application.

capabilities.name: registrations_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's registration for an application (roles, data).

capabilities.name: registrations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user's registration from an application.

capabilities.name: jwt_validate
capabilities.description: Validate a JWT access token and return its claims.

capabilities.name: jwt_refresh
capabilities.description: Exchange a refresh token for a new JWT access token.

capabilities.name: jwt_revoke_refresh_token
capabilities.description: Revoke a refresh token to prevent further token exchanges.

capabilities.name: applications_create
capabilities.description: Create a new application with OAuth settings, roles, and policies.

capabilities.name: applications_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve an application by ID.

capabilities.name: applications_update
capabilities.description: Update an application's settings.

capabilities.name: applications_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an application.

capabilities.name: tenants_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tenant for multi-tenant deployments.

capabilities.name: tenants_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a tenant by ID.

capabilities.name: tenants_update
capabilities.description: Update a tenant's configuration.

capabilities.name: tenants_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a tenant.

capabilities.name: groups_create
capabilities.description: Create a new group to organize users.

capabilities.name: groups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a group by ID.

capabilities.name: groups_update
capabilities.description: Update a group.

capabilities.name: groups_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a group.

capabilities.name: groups_members_add
capabilities.description: Add users to a group.

capabilities.name: groups_members_remove
capabilities.description: Remove users from a group.

capabilities.name: passwordless_start
capabilities.description: Start a passwordless login by sending a magic link or code to the user.

capabilities.name: passwordless_login
capabilities.description: Complete a passwordless login by providing the code from the magic link.

capabilities.name: two_factor_enable
capabilities.description: Enable two-factor authentication for a user with a specific method.

capabilities.name: two_factor_disable
capabilities.description: Disable two-factor authentication for a user.
